style: Children's picture book illustration, soft hand-painted digital art, warm gentle color palette, soft rounded shapes, cozy storybook lighting, whimsical and adorable, high quality. No text, no words, no letters, no watermark.

characters.momo: Momo, a small round river otter with soft chestnut-brown fur, a cream-colored belly and cheeks, big friendly dark eyes, little whiskers and a gentle smile
characters.gaston: Gaston, a small chubby friendly dragon with soft mint-green scales, a pale green belly, tiny cute wings, three little spikes along his head, and big round expressive eyes
characters.lila: Lila, a cheerful young girl about seven years old with light-brown hair tied in two braids, wearing a pink dress
characters.firefly: a tiny glowing firefly with a warm golden light
characters.rabbit: a fluffy white rabbit with long ears
characters.fox: a small orange fox with a white belly and cheeks
characters.owl: a friendly brown owl with big round eyes and little ear tufts

pages.prompt: Momo the otter sits happily by a sunny river with smooth pebbles and gentle ripples, green rolling hills and a leafy tree in the background, bright cheerful morning sky.
Momo the otter looks up in wonder at a glowing golden star that has fallen onto a grassy hilltop at night, deep starry blue sky, a soft crescent moon, magical warm glow around the star.
Momo the otter gently talks to a soft glowing golden star resting on a grassy night hill, tender caring mood, starry sky, warm magical light.
Momo the otter, a fluffy white rabbit and a small orange fox gathered together on a sunny green meadow, friendly and determined, blue sky with fluffy clouds, teamwork.

Momo the otter, a white rabbit and an orange fox playfully stacked on top of each other on a hilltop, the otter at the top gently tossing a glowing golden star up toward the sky, joyful cooperation, daytime.
A golden star shines brightly again in a warm sunset sky above rolling hills and a calm river, Momo the little otter waving happily from below, orange and pink sunset colors, heartwarming.
Gaston the dragon stands proudly in front of a cozy mountain cave on a bright sunny day, green hills and blue sky, cheerful and brave.
Gaston the dragon trembles, scared, inside the dark interior of his cave at night, big worried eyes, deep dark blue and violet tones, faint mysterious soft shadows around him.
Gaston the dragon tries to breathe fire in a dark cave but only a tiny faint spark comes out, worried expression, cozy dark cave, small warm spark of light.
A glowing warm firefly floats into the dark cave and meets shy Gaston the dragon, gentle magical golden light softly illuminating his face, night, tender friendly mood.
A cheerful glowing firefly dances around a smiling Gaston the dragon inside the cave, soft warm light turning the shadows friendly, cozy magical night atmosphere.
Gaston the dragon happily breathes a warm cozy flame that lights up the whole cave, relieved and joyful, warm orange glow filling the space, no monsters, safe and happy.
Brave happy Gaston the dragon and his glowing firefly friend watch the stars together at sunset on a hill near pine trees, warm orange sky, peaceful heartwarming ending.
Lila the girl in a colorful flower garden holding a small shiny silver seed that sparkles in her hands, sunny sky, blooming flowers all around, wonder and curiosity.
Lila the girl kneeling and carefully planting a small seed in soft brown soil in a sunny garden, gentle caring gesture, flowers nearby.
A gentle rainy day over a garden, soft rain falling from grey-blue clouds, a tiny green sprout just starting to emerge from the wet soil, calm soft mood.
Lila the girl smiling with joy at a tiny fresh green sprout emerging from the soil in a sunny garden, hopeful tender moment, bright morning light.
A small plant with green leaves and a single bright orange flower like a little sun, growing in a sunny cheerful garden, blue sky, warm light.
A huge magnificent tree covered in colorful multicolored flowers with little birds singing in its branches at sunset, Lila the girl standing happily beside it, magical warm glowing atmosphere.
An orange fox, a fluffy white rabbit and a friendly brown owl standing together as good friends in a lush green forest with pine trees, sunny day, warm group portrait.
A broken wooden bridge over a swollen rushing river in a green forest, worried little animals on the near bank, dramatic yet child-friendly, blue sky.
An orange fox, a white rabbit and a brown owl thinking and discussing together at the edge of a wide river in a forest, thoughtful problem-solving mood, daytime.

An orange fox climbing a tree, a white rabbit tinkering, and a brown owl drawing plans, together building a clever contraption with ropes and pulleys and vines in a forest, teamwork invention scene, sunny.
A clever little wooden raft pulled by ropes and pulleys, ready to cross a forest river, invention finished, hopeful anticipation, bright day, green surroundings.
A joyful celebration with colorful confetti in a forest at sunset, an orange fox, a white rabbit and a brown owl cheering together happily, festive happy ending, warm orange sky.
